title: Self Improvement Operating Cost Assessment
goal: Implement #467 by making repo-local self-improvement explicitly assess total operating cost, consume captured improvement signals, and separate validation success from actual cost reduction.
non_goals: Do not create a heavyweight optimisation framework.
Do not turn Memory or Planning into a separate self-improvement backlog.
Do not add a shipped autopilot subsystem.

intent.outcome: Each self-improvement pass leaves compact cost-assessment evidence and routes signals to fix, route, review, remember, dismiss, or follow-up.
intent.constraints: Keep this repo-local and compact; use #469 signal intake rather than broad rereads.
intent.latitude: Tighten repo-owned skill guidance, closeout obligation, and maintainer-surface tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if cost assessment needs product-direction judgment beyond existing issues/system intent.

execution.next_step: Archive the completed plan, refresh external evidence, and promote the next open issue from the feature-tier/default-footprint lane.
execution.proof: maintainer-surface tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surface checks, proof selector, planning doctor, summary/report dogfooding

invariants: Cost assessment stays repo-local skill guidance.
Validation success alone is not sufficient evidence of improvement.
Captured improvement signals are inputs, not automatic work items.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450/#449: make the package cheaper to use than bypassing it.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #450/#449 and later footprint/codegen lanes remain after this workflow tightening.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #467 closeout, refresh external evidence and promote the next open issue indicated by roadmap priority

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Self-improvement runs now have to consume improvement_intake signals and leave a compact total-operating-cost assessment before claiming improvement.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Large-surface refactors and footprint compression remain owned by the existing #430-#438/#449/#450 lanes.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Validation success can still be useful proof, but it must be separated from intent satisfaction and net-cost direction.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Focused maintainer tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning checks, proof selection, summary, improvement_intake, and planning doctor all passed.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: No additional #467 validation remains; follow-on lanes should prove their own footprint or extraction changes.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Promote the next open #449/#450 feature-tier or footprint lane after external evidence refresh.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make self-improvement detect and reduce total operating cost.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not equate validation success with system improvement.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact compact cost-assessment wording and tests.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Assessment requires changing product direction or active roadmap priority.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Reduce total successful-completion cost across restart, handoff, review, and proof loops.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Tighten existing self-improvement guidance instead of adding new product machinery.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Will the next self-improvement pass catch cost increases and route them?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to repo-local self-improvement guidance and tests.

immediate_next_action: Patch self-improvement guidance and tests for required operating-cost assessment.
invariants: Cost assessment stays repo-local skill guidance.
Validation success alone is not sufficient evidence of improvement.
Captured improvement signals are inputs, not automatic work items.
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/self-improvement-operating-cost-assessment.plan.json tools/skills/self-improvement-dogfooding/SKILL.md .agentic-workspace/config.toml tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section improvement_intake --format json
completion_criteria: Self-improvement skill requires a total-operating-cost assessment.
Dogfooding closeout separates validation success, issue completion, intent satisfaction, and cost reduction.
Captured improvement signals are named as assessment inputs.
Tests protect the required fields and anti-validation-only rule.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Self-improvement guidance now requires total operating-cost assessment, improvement_signal intake consumption, and an explicit distinction between validation success, issue closure, intent satisfaction, and improvement.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/self-improvement-operating-cost-assessment.plan.json tools/skills/self-improvement-dogfooding/SKILL.md .agentic-workspace/config.toml tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section improvement_intake --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: #449/#450 for package-cheaper-than-bypass and feature-tier compression; #430-#435 for command-generation extraction; #436-#438/#441 for artifact-footprint pressure.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archived execplan should retain only proof, cost assessment, and routed follow-up; command-level detail is discardable.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): .agentic-workspace/config.toml dogfooding closeout hint tightened; no Memory promotion needed.
execution_summary.resume from: refresh external evidence, then promote the next open roadmap issue by priority

execution_run.handoff source: active checked-in execplan plus package summary/proof/report outputs
execution_run.what happened: Updated the repo-local self-improvement skill and workflow obligation so future runs must assess net operating cost and consume improvement signals before closeout.
execution_run.scope touched: repo-local skill guidance, workspace config obligation wording, maintainer-surface test, and planning closeout record
execution_run.validations run: maintainer-surface tests; workspace CLI tests; ruff; planning surface check; proof selector; summary; improvement_intake report; planning doctor
execution_run.result for continuation: Issue #467 is satisfied; larger #449/#450 footprint and cost-compression work remains.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan, refresh external evidence, close #467, then promote the next open lane.

finished_run_review.intent served: yes; future self-improvement closeouts now have to judge net operating-cost direction, not just pass checks.
finished_run_review.config compliance: yes; used package summary, proof, report, doctor, planning checks, and archive flow.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; large-surface candidates are routed, not treated as automatically fixed.
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: archive and keep parent roadmap lanes open

improvement_signal_review.signals consumed: agentic-workspace report --target . --section improvement_intake --format json produced five architecture-cost candidates: src/agentic_workspace/cli.py, packages/planning installer, external evidence JSON, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, and packages/memory installer tests.
improvement_signal_review.signals fixed now: The missing closeout-cost-assessment behavior was fixed in the self-improvement skill and guarded by tests.
improvement_signal_review.signals routed: #430-#435 own command-generation and CLI extraction pressure; #436-#438/#441 own operational-footprint pressure; #449/#450 own package-cheaper-than-bypass and feature-tier compression.
improvement_signal_review.signals still accumulating: Large source/test/artifact surfaces remain visible as improvement candidates until their owning lanes reduce, split, or demote them.

cost_assessment.workflow_cost_found: Self-improvement could previously close on validation evidence without proving lower total operating cost.
cost_assessment.architecture_cost_found: Large-surface improvement candidates are now visible and routed, but not reduced in this slice.
cost_assessment.needless_complexity_found: No new product machinery was needed; existing skill guidance and improvement_intake carry the assessment.
cost_assessment.surfaces_added: No new durable first-contact surface; the active execplan is archival proof.
cost_assessment.surfaces_removed_merged_or_demoted: None in this slice; future lanes own compression.
cost_assessment.artifact_footprint_changed: One execplan is archived after closeout; no new shipped artifact family was added.
cost_assessment.signals_consumed: The improvement_intake candidates from #469 plus repeated dogfooding feedback that package use must be cheaper and mandatory during implementation.
cost_assessment.signals_still_accumulating: Large CLI, installer, test, and external-evidence surfaces remain routed to existing open lanes.
cost_assessment.human_steering_avoided_next_time: The skill now requires cost assessment and signal intake before closeout, reducing the need for a maintainer to ask whether the package actually improved the work.

discard.summary: Command transcript detail from this narrow validation pass is not durable knowledge.

continuation.summary: Continue package-cheaper-than-bypass and feature-tier/default-footprint compression after #467 closeout.

memory.summary: .agentic-workspace/config.toml dogfooding closeout hint tightened; no Memory promotion needed.

config_check.summary: Dogfooding closeout obligation now requires separating validation, issue completion, intent satisfaction, and net operating-cost direction.
.agentic-workspace/config.toml dogfooding closeout hint tightened; no Memory promotion needed.

issue_follow_up.summary: #467 total operating-cost assessment can close after this milestone.
#449/#450 remain the parent product-shape compression lane.
#430-#435 and #436-#438/#441 own the large-surface improvement candidates.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted after #469 closeout; improvement signal capture now exists and this lane makes self-improvement consume it.
2026-04-28: Completed by requiring self-improvement cost assessment and guarding it with maintainer-surface tests.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Make self-improvement detect and reduce total operating cost.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane feature-tier-and-surface-merge activates a fresh bounded slice.
